channel.title: Product Hotfixes

item.title: 68442 Glyph values cause runtime error in POS Client
item.description: System hotfixes 26.1.1 System App, Release date June 24, 2025 - 68442 Glyph values cause runtime error in POS Client: Fixed an error caused by Glyph field being set to values 2, 4, 5, 6, 10 and 11 in POS Menu Line.

item.title: 67601 Printer shows infinite "Opening drawer" when paper empty

item.title: 67901 Pharmacy - Show remaining quantity in E-Prescription list
item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.1 Iceland, Release date July 1, 2025 - 67901 Pharmacy - Show remaining quantity in E-Prescription list: New column showing remaining quantity was added to E-Prescription list.

item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.1 Pharmacies, Release date July 15, 2025 - 67405 Global access to functions in Omni PH-Document tables: Functions exposed:ProcedureCreatePHDocumentFromCOin table 10015455LSC PH Omni PH-DocumentProcedureCreatePHDocumentLinein table 10015456LSC PH Omni PH-Document Line; ProcedureCreatePHDocumentFromCOin table 10015455LSC PH Omni PH-Document; ProcedureCreatePHDocumentLinein table 10015456LSC PH Omni PH-Document Line

item.title: 67403 Global access to functions in codeunit 10015300 "LSC PH Utility"
item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.1 Pharmacies, Release date July 15, 2025 - 67403 Global access to functions in codeunit 10015300 "LSC PH Utility": FunctionGetPricein Pharmacy Utility was exposed.

item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.1 Pharmacies, Release date July 15, 2025 - 67402 Global access to function GetCurrText in table 10015370 "LSC PH Prescription": Details not available.

item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.1 Pharmacies, Release date July 15, 2025 - 67401 Global access to functions in codeunit 10015455 "LSC PH Omni Prescr. Service": Functions were exposed inCU 10015455:CalcSelectedPrescriptionsGetActivePrescriptions; CalcSelectedPrescriptions; GetActivePrescriptions

item.title: 67399 Expose functions and Clear Data Permission filters in "LSC PH Session"
item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.1 Pharmacies, Release date July 15, 2025 - 67399 Expose functions and Clear Data Permission filters in "LSC PH Session": FunctionsInitializeProfileandLogout in PH Sessionwere exposed.

item.title: 67398 Global access to functions in codeunit 10015311 "LSC PH Item Search Management"
item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.1 Pharmacies, Release date July 15, 2025 - 67398 Global access to functions in codeunit 10015311 "LSC PH Item Search Management": Following functions were made visible to third party extensions:AutoFindSubstitutionItemSetQtyFilterCreateSubstitutionItem; AutoFindSubstitutionItem; SetQtyFilter; CreateSubstitutionItem

item.title: 67397 LS Central for pharmacies: Make procedures global
item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.1 Pharmacies, Release date July 15, 2025 - 67397 LS Central for pharmacies: Make procedures global: ProcedureInsertDelegateEntryis visible to extensions.

item.title: 67404 Changes to function OnCalcInsuranceforOmniPresc in codeunit 10037814 "LSC PHIS Insurance Management
item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.2 Iceland, Release date July 15, 2025 - 67404 Changes to function OnCalcInsuranceforOmniPresc in codeunit 10037814 "LSC PHIS Insurance Management: Code in Subscriber exposed as a separate function and event added to enable change of active store.

item.title: 69791 Fix compile errors on POSGUI and other LSC stuff
item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.2 Pharmacies, Release date August 12, 2025 - 69791 Fix compile errors on POSGUI and other LSC stuff: Details not available.

item.title: 69619 Change the UI menus and titles to match those of LS Central
item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.2 Pharmacies, Release date August 12, 2025 - 69619 Change the UI menus and titles to match those of LS Central: Details not available.

item.title: 68589 Pharmacy dispense - Send insurance request - wrong sender
item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.3 Iceland, Release date July 22, 2025 - 68589 Pharmacy dispense - Send insurance request - wrong sender: The Insurance Sender is used in communication with SÍ, if available in the Store Pharmacy Details. Fallback is the Pharmacy ID.

item.title: 61752 Missing icelandic characters in report 10037852
item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.3 Iceland, Release date July 22, 2025 - 61752 Missing icelandic characters in report 10037852: Icelandic characters in fixed texts corrected.

item.title: 69183 Improve the style of the Bottom menu on the UI
item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.3 Pharmacies, Release date August 19, 2025 - 69183 Improve the style of the Bottom menu on the UI: Improved the styling of the elements created on theGenerate Pharmacy Flex UI.

item.title: 68880 Improvements on the Final Control Panel
item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.3 Pharmacies, Release date August 19, 2025 - 68880 Improvements on the Final Control Panel: Fixed scroll problems on theFinal Control Panel. Reduced the margins between buttons on the bottom menu.

item.title: 67774 Can not void transaction that contains Dispense Posted Production Order
item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.3 Pharmacies, Release date August 19, 2025 - 67774 Can not void transaction that contains Dispense Posted Production Order: Details not available.

item.title: 69432 Lyfjaverdskra Import creates prices for customer ALL instead of predefined price group
item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.4 Iceland, Release date July 29, 2025 - 69432 Lyfjaverdskra Import creates prices for customer ALL instead of predefined price group: Import of Lyfjaverðskrá now creates and maintains the default pricelist as set in Sales & Receivable Setup and select the Price Group Code defined in that Price List.

item.title: 65606 Can not reserve dispense order at POS
item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.4 Iceland, Release date July 29, 2025 - 65606 Can not reserve dispense order at POS: Subscriber retrieves the active functionality profile before communicating via Pharmacy Web Client.

item.title: 61752 Missing Icelandic characters in report 10037852
item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.4 Iceland, Release date July 29, 2025 - 61752 Missing Icelandic characters in report 10037852: Icelandic characters in fixed texts corrected.

item.title: 70323 Global Access to Selected Functions in Codeunit "LSC PH Session"
item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.4 Pharmacies, Release date August 26, 2025 - 70323 Global Access to Selected Functions in Codeunit "LSC PH Session": ProceduresGetLocationCodeis now public.

item.title: 70320 Global Access to Selected Functions in Codeunit "LSC PH Item Management"
item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.4 Pharmacies, Release date August 26, 2025 - 70320 Global Access to Selected Functions in Codeunit "LSC PH Item Management": Procedures exposed as public:ShowRelatedItemsByATCShowRelatedItemsBySubstance; ShowRelatedItemsByATC; ShowRelatedItemsBySubstance

item.title: 70635 Pharmacy Dispensation: Prices do not include VAT in dispense production orders
item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.5 Pharmacies, Release date September 9, 2025 - 70635 Pharmacy Dispensation: Prices do not include VAT in dispense production orders: Calculated Price Incl. VAT in Dispense Production is based on the fieldPrice incl. VATin the PriceList line.

item.title: 69515 IS Dispense changed strength on pharmacy item
item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.5 Iceland, Release date August 12, 2025 - 69515 IS Dispense changed strength on pharmacy item: Allows the user to identify Pharmacy Items that 0 strength was changed by Lyfjastofnun to non-zero value. This was causing problems in Dose Dispensing since there were open e-prescriptions issued when the Item had 0 in strength and all quantities calculated in pills.

item.title: 70173 IS insurance sender can be blank
item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.6 Iceland, Release date August 19, 2025 - 70173 IS insurance sender can be blank: The Insurance Sender is used in communication with SÍ, regardless whether it is blank or has value.

item.title: 68269 Posting in posting queue with CU 10015396
item.description: Pharmacies hotfixes 26.1.7 Iceland, Release date September 2, 2025 - 68269 Posting in posting queue with CU 10015396: Insurance Sender isBlankif it is not defined in Store Pharmacy Details. Posting from Posting Queue in Scheduled Job where Scheduler User isnot assignedto a Pharmacy lead to reserved e-prescriptions, without a posted withdraw for posted Prescription Orders. This was fixed.

item.title: 68751 LSCDE-Statement post not trigger the fiskaly upload
item.description: Localization hotfixes 26.1.1 Local Functionality Germany, Release date July 1, 2025 - 68751 LSCDE-Statement post not trigger the fiskaly upload: Details not available.

item.title: 68447 LSC NA Issue when collecting lines 1 by 1 then opening the posted customer order
item.description: Localization hotfixes 26.1.1 Local Functionality N-America, Release date July 8, 2025 - 68447 LSC NA Issue when collecting lines 1 by 1 then opening the posted customer order: Fixed the errors when opening the Posted Customer Order.

item.title: 68788 LSCNA - Handle Subtotal for POS Sales Slip
item.description: Localization hotfixes 26.1.1 Local Functionality N-America, Release date July 8, 2025 - 68788 LSCNA - Handle Subtotal for POS Sales Slip: Added new event,OnBeforePrintSubTotalOnPrintPosSalesInfo.

item.title: 68251 LSC IN - SC-1872-IN | Legal | GST printing on receipt should be provided as a config
item.description: Localization hotfixes 26.1.1 Local Functionality India, Release date July 8, 2025 - 68251 LSC IN - SC-1872-IN | Legal | GST printing on receipt should be provided as a config: Added ability to Print GST details to the receipt based on the setup on the POS functionality profile underAmountFastTab. and Also added ability to print the GST details for each sales line, based on the FieldPrint GST Below Linewhich is also on POS functionality profile.

item.title: 69738 LSC ES - Release Fiskaly Connector
item.description: Localization hotfixes 26.1.1 Local Functionality Spain, Release date August 5, 2025 - 69738 LSC ES - Release Fiskaly Connector: Details not available.

item.title: 70020 Statement-Post together with LSC BE no longer assigns GLE fields "Journal Templ. Name" and "Journal Batch Name"
item.description: Localization hotfixes 26.1.1 Local Functionality Belgium, Release date August 19, 2025 - 70020 Statement-Post together with LSC BE no longer assigns GLE fields "Journal Templ. Name" and "Journal Batch Name": Details not available.

item.title: 68793 LSC IN - GST Calculation Issue - Voided Item if item is same
item.description: Localization hotfixes 26.1.2 Local Functionality India, Release date July 15, 2025 - 68793 LSC IN - GST Calculation Issue - Voided Item if item is same: Voided the item line, it recalculates the GST amount.

item.title: 68239 LSC DE - Fiskaly Error: E_TX_NOT_FOUND Transaction not found in SIGN DE (In Local Functionality DE)
item.description: Localization hotfixes 26.1.2 Local Functionality Germany, Release date July 22, 2025 - 68239 LSC DE - Fiskaly Error: E_TX_NOT_FOUND Transaction not found in SIGN DE (In Local Functionality DE): Fixed an issue where if a partner disabled their TSS and managed to create a new one and a new master cash register, the cash point closings would not work because we would still try to use the old cash point closings.; Fixed related issues such as client registering behavior and some procedures related to creating cash point closings such as fetching fiskaly transactions to create the API request.

item.title: 69507 Double Tax on Receipt
item.description: Localization hotfixes 26.1.2 Local Functionality N-America, Release date July 31, 2025 - 69507 Double Tax on Receipt: Printed one-time tax only in the prebill and split bill.

item.title: 69704 CashPointClosings do not work in Germany's Fiskaly implementation
item.description: Localization hotfixes 26.1.3 Local Functionality Germany, Release date August 5, 2025 - 69704 CashPointClosings do not work in Germany's Fiskaly implementation: Details not available.

item.title: 67683 LSC CA - Sales Header does not exist -POS
item.description: Localization hotfixes 26.1.3 Local Functionality N-America, Release date August 5, 2025 - 67683 LSC CA - Sales Header does not exist -POS: Details not available.

item.title: 69589 Weird amount triggered on CO Total (modify)
item.description: Localization hotfixes 26.1.3 Local Functionality N-America, Release date August 5, 2025 - 69589 Weird amount triggered on CO Total (modify): Details not available.

item.title: 69814 GST Calculation Issue - Voided Item if item is same
item.description: Localization hotfixes 26.1.3 Local Functionality India, Release date August 12, 2025 - 69814 GST Calculation Issue - Voided Item if item is same: Details not available.

item.title: 69929 LSC NA SendTransaction Web Service Not Working when not Local Request
item.description: Localization hotfixes 26.1.4 Local Functionality N-America, Release date August 26, 2025 - 69929 LSC NA SendTransaction Web Service Not Working when not Local Request: Details not available.

item.title: 69704 CashPointClosings do not work in Germany's Fiskaly implementation
item.description: Localization hotfixes 26.1.5 Local Functionality Germany, Release date August 26, 2025 - 69704 CashPointClosings do not work in Germany's Fiskaly implementation: Improved Cash Point Closing refresh processes.; Fixed Business date source.

item.title: 69576 LSC NA - Sales Tax Error on CO Pickup
item.description: Localization hotfixes 26.1.5 Local Functionality N-America, Release date September 2, 2025 - 69576 LSC NA - Sales Tax Error on CO Pickup: Fixed the error: Sales Header does not exist.

item.title: 69271 LSC NA - fr-CA - V26 test - Wrong Translation in Z report
item.description: Localization hotfixes 26.1.6 Local Functionality N-America, Release date September 9, 2025 - 69271 LSC NA - fr-CA - V26 test - Wrong Translation in Z report: Fixed an incorrect caption in fr-CA language.

item.title: 68276 Refund process fails in some scenarios
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.1 Hotels, Release date June 24, 2025 - 68276 Refund process fails in some scenarios: Fixed an issue where a refund on the POS did not enable the PAY button. Applicable toAccrual Accountingonly.; Fixed an issue where refunding payment, including deposit charge, reused the already refunded deposit.; Fixed an issue regardingString too longin the refund panel on POS; When refunding a transaction that has a deposit and a tip in same transaction, you could only refund the tip but not the deposit amount. This was fixed.; Fixed an issue where POS showed wrong balance after refunding deposit after finalizing all folios (on reservations with both guest and company folios) - (issue with deposit assignment not being removed).; Removed the popup on preypayment in accrual accounting when paying on POS.; The amount is now auto-filled for the prepayment, when doing prepayment on the POS from PAY button (reservation still in house).

item.title: 68324 Deposit appears when it has been consumed if deposit no.2 is not signed to folio
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.2 Hotels, Release date July 1, 2025 - 68324 Deposit appears when it has been consumed if deposit no.2 is not signed to folio: Fixed an issue on calculating deposit to use, when two deposits were done and were partially consumed.

item.title: 68325 Group comments not showing on SGL res in POS
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.2 Hotels, Release date July 1, 2025 - 68325 Group comments not showing on SGL res in POS: Group comments were not displayed on POS for reservations within group. This was fixed.

item.title: 68752 Refunded Tip - posting not correct
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.2 Hotels, Release date July 1, 2025 - 68752 Refunded Tip - posting not correct: Fixed an issue, where posting of the tip line after refund was incorrect, now when refunding the tip line it isremovedfrom the detailed revenue entry table. Users have to open the POS again and take the tip again from there.

item.title: 68328 PMS: Nationality report not showing correct data
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.3 Hotels, Release date July 8, 2025 - 68328 PMS: Nationality report not showing correct data: Fixed an issue where the guest list's country code was not updated correctly. This affected the Nationality Report.

item.title: 68562 Balance on POS not correct after doing refund on payment with deposits and charges
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.4 Hotels, Release date July 15, 2025 - 68562 Balance on POS not correct after doing refund on payment with deposits and charges: The balance is now correct after doing a refund on a payment, that included deposit and charge (charged item that was originally paid on POS with deposit collection) and the errorNo Deposit available to consumedoes not show when the refunded amount is paid.; An issue where the company deposit was not being inserted to the journal if the deposit collection was unassigned (folio no = 0) was fixed. Now it checks for it and inserts if available, then users can just void that line if they do not want to use the deposit.

item.title: 67503 Reconciliation tool - Fix duplicated room charge issues
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.5 Hotels, Release date July 22, 2025 - 67503 Reconciliation tool - Fix duplicated room charge issues: New changes added toReconciliation Toolto solve deposit issues related to duplicated charges to room created.; Added a new field next to filters toSkip Deposit Checks, so the process runs faster by enabling it. Disabled by default.; New action,Fix Duplicated Charges to Room, added to fix the records with code 'C2R:DUPLICATED' found previously in the fixing process:If duplicated DRE line is not posted to finance, it deactivates the line and creates a reversal line with negative original amount.If duplicated DRE line is posted to finance, it reverses the line as usual and needs to run the Night Audit to post it again.; If duplicated DRE line is not posted to finance, it deactivates the line and creates a reversal line with negative original amount.; If duplicated DRE line is posted to finance, it reverses the line as usual and needs to run the Night Audit to post it again.; Additionally,Fix tipsaction was changed to include also searching of duplicated tips. So in the searching process, it also looks for tips from duplicated room charges, it adds DUPLICATED label for them in Description field. The fixing process works also for it. New fieldRes. Balanceadded because some cases were found, that were fixed manually by using a negative res. extra, and balance is correct and does not need to be fixed. The user has the information to decide whether to fix it or not.

item.title: 69155 Changing the Folio for a DRE posted to Finance results returns an error
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.5 Hotels, Release date July 22, 2025 - 69155 Changing the Folio for a DRE posted to Finance results returns an error: Fixed update issue on changingFolio No.for posted revenue lineDetailed Revenue Entry.

item.title: 69196 Open Hotel Reservation Deposit page from the POS
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.5 Hotels, Release date July 22, 2025 - 69196 Open Hotel Reservation Deposit page from the POS: Now able to open the reservation deposit page from the folio deposit on the POS hotel template.

item.title: 69255 LS Hotel > Tape Chart cuts the display of hotel reservations that runs through dates with more than 7 nights stay
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.5 Hotels, Release date July 22, 2025 - 69255 LS Hotel > Tape Chart cuts the display of hotel reservations that runs through dates with more than 7 nights stay: Fixed an issue where reservations that were booked over new year disappeared when moving dates on the tape chart.

item.title: 68695 Show line prices on the folios component in reservation web template
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.6 Hotels, Release date August 12, 2025 - 68695 Show line prices on the folios component in reservation web template: Details not available.

item.title: 68960 Can not create a new Deposit Policy
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.6 Hotels, Release date August 12, 2025 - 68960 Can not create a new Deposit Policy: Fixed an issue preventing the creation ofNew Deposit Policies.

item.title: 69199 Enhance usability in Invoice Management page
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.6 Hotels, Release date August 12, 2025 - 69199 Enhance usability in Invoice Management page: Added more filters to the Invoice Management so users can more easily filter on Revenue entries:Description Filter,Paying Reservation Filter,Date Filter.

item.title: 69717 Folio with only Deposit Assignment and no other charges not displayed in POS
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.6 Hotels, Release date August 12, 2025 - 69717 Folio with only Deposit Assignment and no other charges not displayed in POS: After deleting a reservationExtra, with a deposit assigned, the Folio did not show, in the POS to allow a refund. This was fixed.

item.title: 68856 Rate Code activities are not visible on Hotel Reservation web template
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.7 Hotels, Release date August 19, 2025 - 68856 Rate Code activities are not visible on Hotel Reservation web template: Fixed the issue about missing activities on Hotel Reservation POS template: The activities from rate code were not visible. It was because the DRE lines were not updated correctly with the Activity No. on the confirmation of reservation.

item.title: 69636 Application in the Night Audit Pay batch is not specific the reservation
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.7 Hotels, Release date August 19, 2025 - 69636 Application in the Night Audit Pay batch is not specific the reservation: Fixed an issue on applying customer ledger entries to corresponding reservations in theNight Auditprocess. Additionally, fixed an issue on, not creating deposit line for Accommodation Tax.

item.title: 69647 LS Hotels: Tape Chart not searchable by Reservation No.
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.7 Hotels, Release date August 19, 2025 - 69647 LS Hotels: Tape Chart not searchable by Reservation No.: Added ability to search by hotel reservation no. on the Tape chart.

item.title: 69819 Using Folio Pay button to refund negative Folio balance creates extra lines in POS Sales Journal (checked out reservation)
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.7 Hotels, Release date August 19, 2025 - 69819 Using Folio Pay button to refund negative Folio balance creates extra lines in POS Sales Journal (checked out reservation): Fixed an issue where refunding reservation extra items, creates extra lines in POS Trans Line.

item.title: 69829 Hotel POS refund payment lookup does not display all payments
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.7 Hotels, Release date August 19, 2025 - 69829 Hotel POS refund payment lookup does not display all payments: Details not available.

item.title: 69952 Reconciliation Tool Fix for application of Cust Ledger Entry
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.7 Hotels, Release date August 19, 2025 - 69952 Reconciliation Tool Fix for application of Cust Ledger Entry: Added new functionality to fix the previous Cust Ledger Entries applied to wrong reservations:New button in Hotel Reconciliation pageFix Cust. Ledger Entries AppliedNew page,Fix Cust. Ledger Entries Applied, to handle (Deposit) Customer Ledger Entries wrong applied. First, set the correct filters and then run thePopulateaction. Once you got the entries to fix, select them and doFix selectedaction.; New button in Hotel Reconciliation pageFix Cust. Ledger Entries Applied; New page,Fix Cust. Ledger Entries Applied, to handle (Deposit) Customer Ledger Entries wrong applied. First, set the correct filters and then run thePopulateaction. Once you got the entries to fix, select them and doFix selectedaction.

item.title: 70118 Tape Chart: fuzzy search doesn't work for room name
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.7 Hotels, Release date August 19, 2025 - 70118 Tape Chart: fuzzy search doesn't work for room name: Fixed an issue where searching for Room on Tape Chart was case sensitive.

item.title: 65684 Room gets housekeeping status Vacant-Clean even though room is still checked in
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.8 Hotels, Release date August 22, 2025 - 65684 Room gets housekeeping status Vacant-Clean even though room is still checked in: Housekeeping Status Vacant Clean and Vacant Cleaning Request are no longer allowed if Reservation is In House. Setting the status toCleanon an In House Reservation set the Housekeeping Status to Vacant Clean, instead ofOccupied Clean. This was fixed.

item.title: 67784 Allocating Room in Backoffice changes the Unit on DRE
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.8 Hotels, Release date August 22, 2025 - 67784 Allocating Room in Backoffice changes the Unit on DRE: There was an issue, allocating rooms in Backoffice changed the prices. This was fixed.

item.title: 69338 Adding an activity on a hotel POS using BOOKPRODLIST does not add the activity to DRE
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.8 Hotels, Release date August 22, 2025 - 69338 Adding an activity on a hotel POS using BOOKPRODLIST does not add the activity to DRE: Not callingUpdateActivityCust(Rec) procedure where theActivity Customeris being updated, if it exist in hotel but not in activity.

item.title: 69803 Hotel Group Reservation Status is not allowed to be changed once confirmed (confirm if standard functionality)
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.8 Hotels, Release date August 22, 2025 - 69803 Hotel Group Reservation Status is not allowed to be changed once confirmed (confirm if standard functionality): It is now possible to change between different Confirmed statuses on individual and group reservations.Note:It is only possible to do this in group reservations if the new Status also exists for individual reservations (Reservation Type = Room).

item.title: 70120 Member Card No not linked when POS transaction started from the reservation page in POS
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.8 Hotels, Release date August 22, 2025 - 70120 Member Card No not linked when POS transaction started from the reservation page in POS: Fixed an issue where Member Card No was not in refund POS Trans

item.title: 70121 Hotel POS Payment – Error Pop-up Resets Amount to $0.00
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.8 Hotels, Release date August 22, 2025 - 70121 Hotel POS Payment – Error Pop-up Resets Amount to $0.00: The new value was ignored, after an invalid refund amount was entered. This was fixed.

item.title: 69213 Deposit collection over reservation balance not possible, even if "Deposit Amount Over Res balance" field is filled out
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.9 Hotels, Release date August 26, 2025 - 69213 Deposit collection over reservation balance not possible, even if "Deposit Amount Over Res balance" field is filled out: Fixed the issue where deposit collection over reservation balance was not possible even if the Deposit Amount Over Reservation Balance in Hotel Setup was filled out. Now this was fixed and users can take deposit over reservation balance depending on this field from the Hotel Setup.

item.title: 69818 Refund Folio balance deletes the Deposit Assignment for the other Folio(s)
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.9 Hotels, Release date August 26, 2025 - 69818 Refund Folio balance deletes the Deposit Assignment for the other Folio(s): Fixed a refund where deposit assignments got consumed.

item.title: 70164 Checked in reservation remains in the arrival list till users refresh the POS page
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.9 Hotels, Release date August 26, 2025 - 70164 Checked in reservation remains in the arrival list till users refresh the POS page: Fixed an issue on refreshing the arrival list in POS. When you came back from Reservation Card checked in, it did not refresh.

item.title: 70116 When allocating a room that has different room type separate nights it allocates in Tape Chart wrong
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.10 Hotels, Release date August 29, 2025 - 70116 When allocating a room that has different room type separate nights it allocates in Tape Chart wrong: Hotel res entry page, opens up when the reservation is moved to manually set the room numbers if there are many room types.

item.title: 70231 Price for a line where paying for another reservation is not shown on Folio component in POS
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.10 Hotels, Release date August 29, 2025 - 70231 Price for a line where paying for another reservation is not shown on Folio component in POS: The folio lines now show the correct value for the item.

item.title: 70592 Integration events for hotel
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.10 Hotels, Release date August 29, 2025 - 70592 Integration events for hotel: Details not available.

item.title: 68267 Print preview invoice for folio on POS not working
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.11 Hotels, Release date September 2, 2025 - 68267 Print preview invoice for folio on POS not working: Improvements to the printing behavior in the POS:If there are no Receipt No. or Sales Invoice for the folio - Print the Preview Sales Invoice.If there are Receipt No. and Sales Invoice for the folio - The user is prompted if he wants to print the Receipt or Sales Invoice.; If there are no Receipt No. or Sales Invoice for the folio - Print the Preview Sales Invoice.; If there are Receipt No. and Sales Invoice for the folio - The user is prompted if he wants to print the Receipt or Sales Invoice.

item.title: 70148 When deposit is on another folio than "guest" it won't show in POS
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.11 Hotels, Release date September 2, 2025 - 70148 When deposit is on another folio than "guest" it won't show in POS: Fixed an issue with not getting the deposit correctly inserted in POS journal when folio is another than default Guest onTemp BalanceorBlankAccounting (None).

item.title: 70437 Error Code: 85132273 when doing refund deposit after night audit has been run
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.11 Hotels, Release date September 2, 2025 - 70437 Error Code: 85132273 when doing refund deposit after night audit has been run: Error handling for process deposit payment in BackOffice does now avoid showing error logs that are already handled that does not affect the process.

item.title: 70803 Reservation Number added to General Ledger entries on Statement Posting
item.description: Hotels hotfixes 26.1.12 Hotels, Release date September 9, 2025 - 70803 Reservation Number added to General Ledger entries on Statement Posting: Fixed an issue where the hotel reservation number was added to G/L Entry created by POS Statement.

item.title: 68144 Void and Copy is missing card information on voided card payment line
item.description: Autotests hotfixes 26.1.1 Autotests, Release date June 24, 2025 - 68144 Void and Copy is missing card information on voided card payment line: When doing Void and Copy in the POS the voided payment line was not being updated with the card information. This was fixed.

item.title: 68224 Customer ledger entries not being created AGAIN when there is a rounding difference between the customer account tender and payment tender being used
item.description: Autotests hotfixes 26.1.1 Autotests, Release date June 24, 2025 - 68224 Customer ledger entries not being created AGAIN when there is a rounding difference between the customer account tender and payment tender being used: When payment Info Account from POS was made and posted throughStatement Post, it resulted in abnormal rounding. This was fixed.

item.description: Autotests hotfixes 26.1.1 Autotests, Release date June 24, 2025 - 68263 Add PurchaseOffline option to EFT in version 24, 25 and 26 versions: Details not available.

item.title: 67285 Customer Order Refund incorrect Refund Status
item.description: Autotests hotfixes 26.1.2 Autotests, Release date July 1, 2025 - 67285 Customer Order Refund incorrect Refund Status: Wrong Refund status was displayed on Customer Order. This was fixed. If not refunded on POS,Payment Pendingshould be displayed.

item.title: 68036 Error Message The member coupon buffer does not exist
item.description: Autotests hotfixes 26.1.2 Autotests, Release date July 1, 2025 - 68036 Error Message The member coupon buffer does not exist: Details not available.

item.description: Autotests hotfixes 26.1.2 Autotests, Release date July 1, 2025 - 68155 Creating membership card with more than 20 characteres at POS: Prevented overflow error on POS when Member Card length exceeds twenty characters.

item.title: 68071 Payment difference G/L line in Sales Order linked to CO
item.description: Autotests hotfixes 26.1.3 Autotests, Release date July 8, 2025 - 68071 Payment difference G/L line in Sales Order linked to CO: Rounding issue was solved when a second Sales Order was created from Customer Order. CO was created for Warehouse delivery. The SO was partly delivered. Then the Customer Order was edited on POS and additional Item was added. That resulted in an abnormal rounding line, created in the second Sales Order.

item.title: 68160 Member card number missing error when editing a CO with member points payment
item.description: Autotests hotfixes 26.1.3 Autotests, Release date July 8, 2025 - 68160 Member card number missing error when editing a CO with member points payment: Updated record on the POS Transactionssingleinstancecodeunit.; Fixed an issue on backoffice when opening the Member Card from a Customer order.

item.description: Autotests hotfixes 26.1.3 Autotests, Release date July 8, 2025 - 68248 Valid Offer not triggered in Hospitality POS: Resolved discount was not applied when the Member Club did not have attributes.

item.description: Autotests hotfixes 26.1.4 Autotests, Release date July 11, 2025 - 69172 Fix compile failures in hotfix/latest - Customer Order Header: Details not available.

item.description: Autotests hotfixes 26.1.8 Autotests, Release date August 12, 2025 - 68667 Incorrect VAT calculation on Sales Order created by Customer Order: Fixed VAT calculation on Sales Order, created by Customer Order.

item.title: 69853 SumAmountInclVATByCustomerOrderID calculates in LCY causing error creating Customer Orders
item.description: Autotests hotfixes 26.1.8 Autotests, Release date August 12, 2025 - 69853 SumAmountInclVATByCustomerOrderID calculates in LCY causing error creating Customer Orders: Customer Orders and Sales Orders are now in the same currency when creating SO and CO values.

item.title: 70154 Customer Order Edit - Refund Returns an Error - Copy
item.description: Autotests hotfixes 26.1.9 Autotests, Release date August 20, 2025 - 70154 Customer Order Edit - Refund Returns an Error - Copy: Fixed problem when multiple add and void lines on POS could result in error:Customer Order cannot be Updated. Changes will be rolled back.

item.title: 65635 Unexpected behavior with REORDQTY POS Command
item.description: Autotests hotfixes 26.1.10 Autotests, Release date August 26, 2025 - 65635 Unexpected behavior with REORDQTY POS Command: REORDERQTY and REORDERMENUTYPE commands were refactored to fix problems with quantity, line numbers and transaction entries of linked lines.

item.title: 70369 Request user to enter search criteria on Member Contact panel
item.description: Autotests hotfixes 26.1.10 Autotests, Release date August 26, 2025 - 70369 Request user to enter search criteria on Member Contact panel: Details not available.

item.description: Autotests hotfixes 26.1.11 Autotests, Release date August 28, 2025 - 69906 Insufficient Quantity on Receipt Item During Statement Posting - Recipe BOMs: Statement posting now works with excluded recipe/ingredients and Inventory Setup optionPrevent Negative Inventory.

item.title: 69925 Unable to change discount on discount offer products
item.description: Autotests hotfixes 26.1.11 Autotests, Release date August 28, 2025 - 69925 Unable to change discount on discount offer products: Now it is possible to change discount on discount offer products.

item.title: 70216 Referenced refund - Partial amount refund
item.description: Autotests hotfixes 26.1.12 Autotests, Release date September 8, 2025 - 70216 Referenced refund - Partial amount refund: When doing a referenced refund on a card payment in the POS, the POS now is able to do a partial amount refund. that is not fully refund the entire original amount of the card payment. The refunded amount for the card payment is stored on the original Card Entry for the payment and can be viewed in theTransaction Registry->Card Entriesview for the original transaction.; When doing a second refund on the same payment the amount that is presented to the cashier has to be the remaining amount available for refund on the card payment not the original amount.; To activate this functionality configurationsUse Reference RefundandUse Refund Selectionmust both be active.

item.title: 70601 Member Scheme Upgrade Skips a Level
item.description: Autotests hotfixes 26.1.12 Autotests, Release date September 8, 2025 - 70601 Member Scheme Upgrade Skips a Level: Details not available.

item.title: 70835 Member Point Offer Not Triggering by Item Category After Upgrade to Version 26.1
item.description: Autotests hotfixes 26.1.12 Autotests, Release date September 8, 2025 - 70835 Member Point Offer Not Triggering by Item Category After Upgrade to Version 26.1: The list of offers were only filtered by Item. This was fixed and now finds an offer based on all types.

item.title: 69309 License manager setup error in French
item.description: Autotests hotfixes 26.1.13 Autotests, Release date September 9, 2025 - 69309 License manager setup error in French: Increased variable size to handle translations that require more characters.

item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.1, Release date June 24, 2025 - 68144 Void and Copy is missing card information on voided card payment line: When doing Void and Copy in the POS the voided payment line was not being updated with the card information. This was fixed.

item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.1, Release date June 24, 2025 - 68189 SendTransaction web service is always run even tough "TS Void Transactions" is not turned on: TS Void Transaction on refund transaction avoids using send transaction WS when it is not turned on. This was fixed.

item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.1, Release date June 24, 2025 - 68224 Customer ledger entries not being created AGAIN when there is a rounding difference between the customer account tender and payment tender being used: When payment Info Account from POS was made and posted throughStatement Post, it resulted in abnormal rounding. This was fixed.

item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.1, Release date June 24, 2025 - 68263 Add PurchaseOffline option to EFT in version 24, 25 and 26 versions: Details not available.

item.title: 68264 When statements are created the number series leaves gap
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.1, Release date June 24, 2025 - 68264 When statements are created the number series leaves gap: Fixed number series gap when creating statements.

item.title: 68268 Customer order process breaks if order is posted as customer invoice
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.1, Release date June 24, 2025 - 68268 Customer order process breaks if order is posted as customer invoice: When a Customer Order is collected and finalized on POS with thePost + Print Customer Invoice(POSTINVOICE) the Customer Order is posted if fully collected and paid.

item.title: 68287 Wrong ILE for NEG_ADJ on BOM Components when Posting Statement
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.1, Release date June 24, 2025 - 68287 Wrong ILE for NEG_ADJ on BOM Components when Posting Statement: Quantity was wrong when using NEG_ADJ on BOM Items on the POS. This was fixed.

item.title: 68327 Bookings - Activity not linked to POS Transaction after getting added to the POS to be paid
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.1, Release date June 24, 2025 - 68327 Bookings - Activity not linked to POS Transaction after getting added to the POS to be paid: An issue was fixed, that could cause mismatch in payment status on an activity, and the related reservation. When an activity is pulled into POS journal line, the insert process and the assignment of receipt/line towards the activity is now within same commit and should eliminate any issues related to errors during the payment process on POS.

item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.1, Release date June 24, 2025 - 68381 New Event OnAfterInitReversTransLineDiscRec in LSC POS Price Utility #524: AddedOnAfterInitReversTransLineDiscRecevent on codeunit POS Price Utility.

item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.1, Release date June 24, 2025 - 68382 OnBeforeSendAtEndOfTransaction #525: Changed eventOnBeforeSendAtEndOfTransactionon POS transaction Server utility codeunit.

item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.1, Release date June 24, 2025 - 68383 Add SetNoPrint procedure to control printing behavior #526: ProcedureSetNoPrintmade public in POS Print Utility.

item.title: 64466 Reprice on refund when member added
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.3, Release date July 1, 2025 - 64466 Reprice on refund when member added: Reprice on refund skipped. This was fixed.

item.title: 66098 Serial Number handling on the POS
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.3, Release date July 1, 2025 - 66098 Serial Number handling on the POS: New option was added in Retail item cardLSC Assign SerialNo/LotNo In CO Picking, which specifies whether to delay assigning SerialNo/LotNo until the picking of the item in the Customer Order. If this field is selected, the SerialNo/LotNo is assigned when the item is picked in the CO. If this field is not selected, the SerialNo/LotNo is assigned when the item is added to POS.

item.title: 67285 Customer Order Refund incorrect Refund Status
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.3, Release date July 1, 2025 - 67285 Customer Order Refund incorrect Refund Status: Wrong Refund status was displayed on Customer Order. This was fixed. If not refunded on POS,Payment Pendingshould be displayed.

item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.3, Release date July 1, 2025 - 67568 Retrieve valid price from closed price list #507: Details not available.

item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.3, Release date July 1, 2025 - 67601 Printer shows infinite "Opening drawer" when paper empty: Details not available.

item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.3, Release date July 1, 2025 - 67894 Creating Retail Item Barcode from Mask using Item number fails: It is now possible to create a barcode from a barcode mask, including item number.

item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.3, Release date July 1, 2025 - 68644 Public Methods in Periodic Discounts #531: Made three procedures publicly available in Periodic discount.

item.title: 64466 Reprice on refund when member added
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.4, Release date July 8, 2025 - 64466 Reprice on refund when member added: Reprice on refund was skipped. This was fixed.

item.title: 67527 Transaction goes into Payment mode without Item Lines
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.4, Release date July 8, 2025 - 67527 Transaction goes into Payment mode without Item Lines: Pressing Total is no longer allowed, unless having at least one POS Trans. Line.

item.title: 68071 Payment difference G/L line in Sales Order linked to CO
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.4, Release date July 8, 2025 - 68071 Payment difference G/L line in Sales Order linked to CO: Rounding issue was solved when a second Sales Order was created from Customer Order. CO was created for Warehouse delivery. The SO was partly delivered. Then the Customer Order was edited on POS and additional Item was added. That resulted in an abnormal rounding line, created in the second Sales Order.

item.title: 68160 Member card number missing error when editing a CO with member points payment
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.4, Release date July 8, 2025 - 68160 Member card number missing error when editing a CO with member points payment: Updated record on the POS Transactionssingleinstancecodeunit.; Fixed an issue on backoffice when opening the Member Card from a Customer order.

item.title: 68248 Valid Offer not triggered in Hospitality POS
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.4, Release date July 8, 2025 - 68248 Valid Offer not triggered in Hospitality POS: Resolved discount was not applied when the Member Club did not have attributes.

item.title: 68396 Setting 0 Discount on Payment Lines sets Amount to 0
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.4, Release date July 8, 2025 - 68396 Setting 0 Discount on Payment Lines sets Amount to 0: The POS allowed the cashier to add a discount to a payment line, which could result in the payment amount being set to 0. This was fixed.

item.title: 68433 Reprice on refund when member added
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.4, Release date July 8, 2025 - 68433 Reprice on refund when member added: Reprice on refund was skipped. This was fixed.

item.title: 68623 Added OnBeforeOutgoingShopifyImageData event #530
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.4, Release date July 8, 2025 - 68623 Added OnBeforeOutgoingShopifyImageData event #530: Shopify Image Events activatedOnBeforeOutgoingShopifyImageData2OnAfterProcessShopifyImageData2; OnBeforeOutgoingShopifyImageData2; OnAfterProcessShopifyImageData2; Note:Event will be added to Central 26.1. Central 27 uses GraphQL for images, so these events will not be available there as the process for image uploads are totally different.

item.title: 68634 ValidateTaxParameter not working as expected
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.4, Release date July 8, 2025 - 68634 ValidateTaxParameter not working as expected: EventOnBeforeValidationOfTaxCalculationadded to Customer Order Line table.

item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.4, Release date July 8, 2025 - 68675 Error in codeunit LSCShopifySchOrder "COpayment already exist with blank DocumentID, Store = web and Line No. 10000: Details not available.

item.title: 68822 No change in service charge on total press when sales type is changes from dine in to takeaway
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.4, Release date July 8, 2025 - 68822 No change in service charge on total press when sales type is changes from dine in to takeaway: If a retail charge is inserted onTotalPressedbased on a sales type, and then lines with that sales type, change sales type, or are voided, whenTotalPressedis pressed again, the retail charge line becomes voided.

item.title: 68799 Z-Report not Closing Down POS/ Clearing X
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.5, Release date July 11, 2025 - 68799 Z-Report not Closing Down POS/ Clearing X: Issue with Z-Report payment entries did not clear after print was fixed.

item.title: 68931 Payment with Member Points displays the amount popup even when error message was displayed before
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.5, Release date July 11, 2025 - 68931 Payment with Member Points displays the amount popup even when error message was displayed before: Do not display the amount popup, when error message is displayed before Payment with Member Points.

item.title: 69019 Dialog Box error in Membership Upgrade/Downgrade
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.5, Release date July 11, 2025 - 69019 Dialog Box error in Membership Upgrade/Downgrade: Added missingGuiAllowedbefore a popup was displayed.

item.title: 69172 Fix compile failures in hotfix/latest - Customer Order Header
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.5, Release date July 11, 2025 - 69172 Fix compile failures in hotfix/latest - Customer Order Header: Details not available.

item.title: 67746 Discounts not recalculated and added to modifiers when added after the discount is triggered
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.6, Release date July 15, 2025 - 67746 Discounts not recalculated and added to modifiers when added after the discount is triggered: Periodic discounts are now applied to linked modifier lines when they are inserted into the transaction. Previously, a discount offer on modifier lines were applied to modifier lines if the discount offer was activated, after selecting modifiers (for example, if member scanned after selecting the modifiers then that action, activated a discount offer).

item.title: 68961 An event to have an option to change or skip the prompt message when using the Print_Z Command
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.6, Release date July 15, 2025 - 68961 An event to have an option to change or skip the prompt message when using the Print_Z Command: New eventOnBeforeZReportConfirmwas added toLSC POS Transaction Implcodeunit.

item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.6, Release date July 15, 2025 - 69032 Requested event to clear uncompressed discount voucher lines #535: New eventOnBeforeClearDiscountEntryTmpwas added toLSC POS Post Utilitycodeunit.

item.title: 69161 AL: Fix Variant using Desc as name
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.6, Release date July 15, 2025 - 69161 AL: Fix Variant using Desc as name: Fixed Error: OPTION_DOES_NOT_EXIST, whenUse Variant Descriptionoption is checked under Shopify Administration page.; Fixed fulfillment handling from Shopify that caused invalid order ID error and wrong qtr of items were shipped.

item.title: 69222 Some cleanup for LSC-69172
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.6, Release date July 15, 2025 - 69222 Some cleanup for LSC-69172: Details not available.

item.title: 68232 BarcDataEntry cuts 0 from front of Giftcard entry
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.7, Release date July 22, 2025 - 68232 BarcDataEntry cuts 0 from front of Giftcard entry: Allow the “Keep Leading Zeroes in Barc.” field in the “POS Data Entry Type” table to be set to true for all Numbering selection.

item.title: 68795 Payment issue
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.7, Release date July 22, 2025 - 68795 Payment issue: Issued fixed with INCEXP as overtender which does not close the transaction.

item.title: 68801 LSC AU - Sales Order - Invoicing issue

item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.17, Release date August 19, 2025 - 70026 Fix coupon discount in Customer Order: Coupon discount % calculation is not taking into account quantity when processing collect from web Customer Order.

item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.17, Release date August 19, 2025 - 70067 Referenced refund payments - format the amount: When displaying referenced refund payment list, in a region where the decimal point is a comma, the list displaying the cards payments for refund was not being formatted correctly. This was fixed. When voiding a card payment within the same day, the POS does not try to retrieve token storage information for the voided payment.

item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.18, Release date August 20, 2025 - 70154 Customer Order Edit - Refund Returns an Error - Copy: Fixed problem when multiple add and void lines on POS could result in error:Customer Order cannot be Updated. Changes will be rolled back.

item.title: 70175 AL: Fix GetSelectedSalesDoc WS
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.18, Release date August 20, 2025 - 70175 AL: Fix GetSelectedSalesDoc WS: GetSelectedSalesDocReward Points earned was fixed.Transaction lookup was fixed, because of empty Transaction record.Deal line was missing in HospOrder. This was fixed.Change Payment Line number to actual number + 99 to be able to retrieve original line number.; Reward Points earned was fixed.; Transaction lookup was fixed, because of empty Transaction record.; Deal line was missing in HospOrder. This was fixed.; Change Payment Line number to actual number + 99 to be able to retrieve original line number.; GetSalesInfoByOrderIdTransaction lookup was fixed, because of empty Transaction record.; Transaction lookup was fixed, because of empty Transaction record.

item.title: 70264 Booking POS Posting: Make the Cleanup function lock unfriendly
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.18, Release date August 20, 2025 - 70264 Booking POS Posting: Make the Cleanup function lock unfriendly: The Booking Posting POS cleanup () function made more lock efficient by checking if it is empty prior and also the search loop is not started in record locking mode.; Note:This function should rarely write anything to the db. It would be only in the cases where the POS created a reservation, but the user voided the lines. The reservation would not have any activities and the cleanup tries to delete the empty reservation.

item.title: 70216 Referenced refund - Partial amount refund
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.24, Release date September 8, 2025 - 70216 Referenced refund - Partial amount refund: When doing a referenced refund on a card payment in the POS, the POS now is able to do a partial amount refund. that is not fully refund the entire original amount of the card payment. The refunded amount for the card payment is stored on the original Card Entry for the payment and can be viewed in theTransaction Registry->Card Entriesview for the original transaction.; When doing a second refund on the same payment the amount that is presented to the cashier has to be the remaining amount available for refund on the card payment not the original amount.; To activate this functionality configurationsUse Reference RefundandUse Refund Selectionmust both be active.

item.title: 70382 Activity Matrix blank in v26
item.description: LS Centralhotfixes 26.1.24, Release date September 8, 2025 - 70382 Activity Matrix blank in v26: Fixed and issue where the matrix could be empty when loaded.

This was fixed. There was also an error with a bag that had a remaining amount different from the starting amount, the bag was not able to post a safe transfer. This was fixed.
